characters.name: Richard Hannay
characters.description: A restless South African mining engineer recently returned to London, becomes embroiled in an espionage plot after Scudder's murder.

characters.name: Franklin Scudder
characters.description: An American freelance spy who reveals a conspiracy to Hannay, then is murdered in Hannay's flat, leaving behind a coded notebook.

settings.name: Hannay's Portland Place flat
settings.description: Hannay's London flat where Scudder takes refuge and is later found murdered.

settings.name: Scottish moorland
settings.description: The open Scottish countryside where Hannay flees to evade pursuit.

plot_threads.thread: The Black Stone conspiracy — a foreign plot against Britain that Scudder uncovered
Hannay framed for Scudder's murder and on the run from both police and conspirators
Decoding Scudder's notebook to understand the full conspiracy

world_rules: Set in pre-WWI Britain with rising international tensions
Hannay must evade both the police (who suspect him of murder) and the conspirators (who want him silenced)
